race.comment: NOTHIN' WONG HERE (2) is building the right way and looks set to peak rising to 2000m fourth-up. He was strong on speed last start at Geelong and will be even tougher to stop this time. RORKES DRIFT (8) finished full of running last start at Ballarat and now rises sharply in trip third-up. Still lightly raced, so has plenty of improvement to come and shapes as a major threat. SHAW CAN FLY (9) took a good step forward second-up when beaten a head over this trip at Ballarat. He maps to land right on speed again from the low draw and keeps Egan. Expected to be in this for a very long way. SHOTARO (10) has built nicely in his debut prep and is another ready to peak fourth-up. Can't be taken lightly.
